landing.headline: Stop planning. Start traveling.
landing.subheadline: Paste a link from that travel video you saved. In 30 seconds you'll have a complete day-by-day itinerary with maps, perfect timing, and hidden gems you'd never find on your own.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything a traveler dreams of. Nothing you don't need.
landing.featuresSubtitle: One app replaces your 12 open tabs, 3 spreadsheets, and that notes app you never find.

linkImport.title: From saved video to itinerary
linkImport.desc: That TikTok you saved at 2am? Paste the link. We extract every place, validate on Google Maps, and build your trip.

aiItinerary.title: Days that actually make sense
aiItinerary.desc: No more zigzagging. Nearby places are grouped together, viewpoints at sunset, markets in the morning. Like a local planned it.

mapView.title: See your whole trip at a glance
mapView.desc: Color-coded pins by day. Click a day, see the route. Zoom out, see the week. You'll never feel lost.

smartTiming.title: Perfect timing, every day
smartTiming.desc: Sunrise spots in the morning, long lunches at the right hour, golden hour at viewpoints. Every moment is intentional.

flightsHotels.title: Flights & notes in one place
flightsHotels.desc: Add your flights, jot down visa reminders, packing lists — everything lives with your itinerary. No more scattered info.

smartSuggestions.title: Hidden gems you'd miss
smartSuggestions.desc: Get suggestions the guides don't mention. That rooftop bar with the view, the bakery only locals know, the shortcut through the park.

landing.howItWorksTitle: So simple it feels like magic

step1.title: Paste the link you already saved
step1.desc: That travel video bookmarked on Instagram, YouTube or TikTok? Paste it here. We extract every place mentioned — automatically.

step2.title: Watch your trip come alive
step2.desc: In 30 seconds: a complete itinerary with smart timing, nearby grouping, sunset viewpoints, and every place validated on Google Maps.

step3.title: Make it yours and go
step3.desc: Drag to reorder, ask for changes, add your flights. It's your trip — we just made the hard part disappear.

landing.ctaTitle: Your next trip deserves more than a spreadsheet
landing.ctaSubtitle: Paste a link and watch your itinerary come alive in seconds. Free, no signup, no limits.
landing.demoProfileDesc: Cultural traveler who loves local cuisine, street photography and exploring authentic neighborhoods. Prefers unique experiences over crowded tourist spots.

tripForm.name: Trip Name *
tripForm.numDaysHint: You can add or remove days later

profile.title: Your Traveler Profile
profile.howSplit: How do you want to split your {days} days?
profile.emptyFallback: Profile analysis incomplete. Confirm to generate itinerary with default settings, or edit to customize.
profile.modalSubtitle: Here's what we understood about your travel style
profile.whatYouWant: What do you want in your trip?
profile.whatYouWantDesc: Select what matters to you — we'll prioritize these in your itinerary

processing.analyzingDesc: Detecting cities, interests and travel style
processing.generatingDesc: Validating places on Google Maps and creating itinerary

feedback.title: Refine with AI

feedback.placeholderTrip: What would you change about the overall itinerary?

analyzeResult.learnMoreDesc: See details, photos, hours and maps
analyzeResult.createItineraryDesc: Build a day-by-day travel plan from this content

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to access your trips
auth.registerSubtitle: Start planning your trips for free
auth.name: Full Name
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

onboarding.step1Desc: Found an amazing travel video on TikTok, Instagram, or YouTube? Paste the link here and our AI will extract all the places mentioned.
onboarding.step2Desc: See every place from the video with photos, ratings, and descriptions. The AI also suggests hidden gems you might love nearby.
onboarding.step3Desc: The AI builds your traveler profile — interests, pace, and style. Adjust everything before confirming to get the perfect itinerary.
onboarding.step4Desc: Get a complete itinerary with iconic attractions, restaurants, and activities organized by day — all with Google Maps ratings and real photos.
onboarding.step5Desc: Not happy with something? Give feedback on any day or the whole trip and the AI will adjust. Swap places, change order, add new spots.
onboarding.step6Desc: See everything on the map — your hotel, each day's attractions, walking distances. Filter by day to focus on what matters.
onboarding.step7Desc: Add your flights, hotel, and personal notes all in one place. Your hotel appears on the map so you can see distances to each attraction.
onboarding.step8Desc: Download a beautiful PDF of your itinerary or share it with friends via WhatsApp, email, or a direct link.
